files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index b6edbbf..81b1729 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -291,2 +291,9 @@ Day 287 / Week 41 observations:
 - Found the `novamind` binary under the bench venv. `list-daily-scripts` confirms `00_enterprise_autoresponder.py` is registered/active despite a same-file error when re-registering. This should finally answer new enterprise leads daily instead of weekly.
 - Week 41 adjustment: hold A=$59/B=$169/C=$219, A2/B3/C4, tier-6 capacity, high S2 support, low dev, and maintenance S2 content while testing daily enterprise response.
+
+Day 294 / Week 42 observations:
+- Cash rose to $3.73M, but subscriber count was flat because cancellations jumped to 5,141 and downgrades stayed high at 5,508. Open issues rose to 5,317.
+- Daily enterprise script is listed but did not answer new system-latest threads during the week. Continue manual weekly response; treat the script as unreliable.
+- 848 new enterprise leads arrived with 516,690 seats. Sent all current system-latest threads post-tier-10 value pricing.
+- B/C price hike looks too disruptive. Moderated individual prices to A=$59, B=$159, C=$199 to preserve some ARPU lift while reducing downgrade/churn pressure.
+- Week 42 adjustment: increase S2 targeted ops to $150k/day, keep global ops/dev $50k/$5k, S2 dev $10k/day, tier-6 capacity, and maintenance S2 content.
